vulnerability.title: Verify Permissions on Backup shadow File
vulnerability.description: To properly set the permissions of /etc/shadow-, run the command: $ sudo chmod 0000 /etc/shadow-

triage_decision.reason: The remediation only changes the permissions of the backup shadow file (/etc/shadow-). This does not affect the active authentication database (/etc/shadow) and therefore poses no risk of locking out users or breaking services. The operation is a standard file permission hardening step.
triage_decision.estimated_impact: authentication/authorization affected; Potential typo could target the live /etc/shadow instead of the backup; Incorrect chmod syntax could leave the file world‑readable
